color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
STEP 1 — embed-and-search
ctx.step.run()
Result cached — replays skip this step

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
embed_texts([question])[0]
Wrap question in list, embed it,
take index 0 for the single vector
Must use same model as ingestion

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gemini: embed_content()
model: gemini-embedding-2
output_dimensionality: 768
Returns question as 768-dim vector

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
client.query_points()
collection: docs
query: [768 floats]
with_payload: True
limit: top_k

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Extract payload text
payload.get('text') or payload.get('texts','')
Builds contexts list and sources set

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
→ RAGSearchResult
contexts: list of chunk strings
sources: list of PDF filenames

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
STEP 2 — generate-answer
ctx.step.run()
Receives found.contexts from Step 1

div.style: color: rgb(45, 52, 54) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
→ early return
No relevant context found
in the knowledge base

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Build context_block
Join chunks as bullet points
with double newlines between

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gemini: generate_content()
model: gemini-2.5-flash-lite
temperature: 0.2
max_output_tokens: 1024

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
→ RAGQueryResult
answer: str
contexts: list of chunks used
num_contexts: int
